button.primary: bg-emerald-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-full hover:bg-white transition-all shadow-2xl shadow-emerald-500/20 active:scale-95
button.secondary: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-widest rounded-full hover:bg-white hover:text-black transition-colors

card.glass: bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl rounded-[2rem] hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-700
card.product: group relative rounded-[2rem] overflow-hidden bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/10 shadow-xl transition-all duration-700 hover:border-white/20

components.badge: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-[10px] uppercase tracking-widest font-mono
